caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a background of dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt. Positioned closely in front of him is a professional condenser microphone held by a silver shock mount; the arm of the mount bears the text "Audio-Technica AT2020". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the first frame, he looks forward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, his mouth opens and he begins to move his right hand upward and outward into the frame. By the final frames, he is actively gesturing with both hands while maintaining a focused expression, with his right hand blurred by motion as he emphasizes his speech.
